2022 HNSA Conference
Registration is now open for the 2022 HNSA Conference in Hawai‘i and hosted by the Battleship Missouri Memorial! Mark your calendars, the conference will take place from Tuesday, September 13 through Friday, September 16 in the heart of Waikiki at the Hilton Waikiki Beach.

Fleet Talk
Associate Members
Who We Are
The Historic Naval Ships Association (HNSA) links the public with historic ships from around the world. These ships are storytellers and the deeds of those who served aboard them provide inspiration to present and future generations.

The Association is a non-profit organization whose membership is comprised of naval ship museums and memorials around the world as well as individuals, businesses and organizations that promote our mission. We support the ships in our Fleet by being a networking and information hub linking our members to advance the preservation and promotion of all ships we represent.
